title: RBI Revises Capital Adequacy Rules for Rural Co-operative Banks on Forex and Gold Risk
description:
RBI has introduced a uniform framework for calculating capital requirements on foreign exchange and gold open positions, strengthening market risk management for Rural Co-operative Banks from April 1, 2027.
The post RBI Revises Capital Adequacy Rules for Rural Co-operative Banks on Forex and Gold Risk appeared first on TaxGuru.
